auth.name: x-api-key
auth.description: Obtain key from Secrets Manager: naleko/agent/api-key

tools.name: list_employees
tools.description: List all onboarding employees with optional pagination. Returns employee_id, email, first_name, last_name, department, stage, risk_band for each record.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20, max 100).

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's lastEvaluatedKey field.

tools.name: get_employee
tools.description: Retrieve a single employee record by ID. Returns non-PII fields: employee_id, email, first_name, last_name, department, stage, risk_band, risk_reason, created_at, updated_at.

id.description: UUID of the employee (employee_id in DynamoDB).

tools.name: list_verifications
tools.description: List document verification records with optional filtering by status (PENDING, PASSED, FAILED, MANUAL_REVIEW). Returns verification_id, employee_id, document_type, ocr_status, confidence, decision, created_at.

tools.name: get_verification_summary
tools.description: Get an AI-generated plain-English summary of a document verification. Uses Amazon Bedrock (Claude) to summarise the OCR result, confidence score, and decision. Useful for human-readable status reports.

tools.name: assess_employee_risk
tools.description: Run Bedrock risk classification on an employee's document verifications. Returns a risk_band (LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH) and a plain-English risk_reason. Triggers the classifyOnboardingRisk Lambda which calls Claude via Amazon Bedrock.

id.description: UUID of the employee to assess (employee_id).

requestBody.description: Empty body — employee_id is provided via path parameter.

tools.name: query_audit_log
tools.description: Query the immutable POPIA-compliant audit log (onboarding-events table). Supports filtering by employeeId and/or ISO 8601 date range. Returns events with eventId, timestamp, source, detailType, actor (AGENT|HUMAN), and detail payload.

employeeId.description: Filter log entries to a specific employee. Uses the employeeId-timestamp-index GSI for efficient lookup.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 lower bound on event timestamp (inclusive). Example: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z

endDate.description: ISO 8601 upper bound on event timestamp (inclusive). Example: 2026-12-31T23:59:59Z

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (default 50, max 200).
